violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employees were observed putting on gloves without first washing their hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touching their phone with gloved hands and did not change his gloves. Gloves should be changed after touching items not involved in food preparation.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Deli sliced beef found uncovered in the refrigerated prep table near the flat top grill. Food items should be covered to protect from contamination. ***Deli meat found on the bottom shelf in the refrigerated prep table. Plastic container of raw chicken was above the beef. Highly recommend placing ready to eat beef on top shelf above the chicken. Although no visible leakage from the chicken container at this time, contamination is still possible.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found on the side of the bucket with sanitizing solution. Wiping cloths should be stored in sanitizing solution between uses.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Thermometers were not located in multiple refrigerated food prep tables. Thermometers should be available for monitoring temperatures.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the ventilation system were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Only one sink is provided in the kitchen for washing hands. Second hand washing sink was removed during remodel. Current handwashing sink location is not convenient for hand washing during pizza preparation.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Kitchen ceiling is acoustic tiles. Ceiling should be smooth, non-absorbent and easily cleanable material.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
